source:
{#if Array.isArray(data) && data.length > 0}
(api = emblaApi)} plugins={[autoplayPlugin]} opts={{ loop: true }} class="relative" role="region" aria-label="Now playing movies carousel"> {#each data as item, index (item.id)} {@const isTV = item.media_type === "tv"} {@const mediaType = isTV ? "tv" : "movie"} {@const displayTitle = item.title ?? item.name ?? "Untitled"}
{#key currentIndex === index ? currentIndex : -1}
{#if logos[item.id]} {:else}

{displayTitle}

{/if}
{isTV ? "Series" : "Movie"} {#if certifications[item.id] || (item.certification && item.certification !== "N/A")} | {certifications[item.id] || item.certification} {/if} | {getSeasonAndYear( item.release_date || item.first_air_date || "" )} {#if item.original_language} | {item.original_language} {/if} {#if ratings[item.id]?.scores?.length}
{#each ratings[item.id]!.scores! as score (score.name)} {#if score.image} {/if} {score.score} {/each}
{:else if item.vote_average} | {item.vote_average.toFixed(1)} {/if}
{#if item.overview}

{item.overview}

{/if} {#if item.genre_ids?.length}
{#each item.genre_ids.slice(0, 4) as genreId (genreId)} {#if TMDB_GENRES[genreId]}
{TMDB_GENRES[genreId]}
{/if} {/each}
{/if}
{#if showRequestButton} {/if}
{/key} {/each}
{currentIndex + 1} / {data.length}
{#each data as _item, i (i)} {/each}
{:else}
{/if}

{data.entity.name} - Riven {#if birthdayToday && !data.entity.deathday} {/if} {#key data.entity.id}
{#if birthdayToday && !data.entity.deathday}
{#each Array(20) as i}
{/each}
{/if} {#if currentBackdrop?.backdrop_path}
{:else if data.entity.profile_path}
{:else}
{/if} {#if carouselItems.length > 0}
{/if}
{#if birthdayToday && !data.entity.deathday}
­ƒÄé
{/if}
{#if birthdayToday && !data.entity.deathday}
­ƒÄé
{/if}

{data.entity.name}

{@render metadataBadges()}
{@render alsoKnownAs( "text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide lg:text-sm lg:normal-case lg:tracking-normal text-zinc-400", "hidden lg:inline" )}
{#if data.entity.biography}

Biography

{data.entity.biography}

{#if data.entity.biography.length > 300 && data.entity.imdb_id} Read More on IMDb {/if}
{/if}
{@render creditsSection("Movies", movieCredits, 200)} {@render creditsSection("TV Shows", showCredits, 250)} {@render creditsSection("Crew", crewCredits, 300)}
{/key} {#snippet creditsSection(title: string, credits: typeof movieCredits, delay: number)} {#if credits.length > 0}

{title}

({credits.length})
{@render creditList(credits)}
{/if} {/snippet} {#snippet creditList(credits: typeof movieCredits)} {#each credits as credit, index (`${credit.id}-${index}`)} {/each} {/snippet} {#snippet metadataBadges()} {#if data.entity.known_for_department} {data.entity.known_for_department} {/if} {#if data.entity.gender} {data.entity.gender} {/if} {#if data.entity.birthday} {formatDate(data.entity.birthday)} {#if !data.entity.deathday} ÔÇó {calculateAge(data.entity.birthday)} y/o{/if} {/if} {#if data.entity.place_of_birth} {data.entity.place_of_birth} {/if} {/snippet} {#snippet alsoKnownAs(titleClass = "text-sm font-semibold", colonClass = "")} {#if data.entity.also_known_as.length > 0}

Also known as:

{#each data.entity.also_known_as as alias} {alias} {/each}
{/if} {/snippet}

source:
{#snippet sectionHeading(title: string)}

{title}

{/snippet} {#snippet mediaCarousel( items: Array<{ id: number; title: string; poster_path: string | null; media_type: string; year?: number | string | null; }>, title: string, delay: number = 600 )}
{@render sectionHeading(title)} {#each items as item (item.id)} {/each}
{/snippet} {#snippet episodeTrigger(episode: any, rivenEpisode: any)} {#snippet topRight()} {#if rivenEpisode?.state} {/if} {/snippet} {#snippet meta()} {episode.aired} {#if episode.runtime} {episode.runtime} min {/if} {/snippet} {/snippet} {#snippet episodeMetadata(episode: any, rivenEpisode: any)}
{data.mediaDetails?.details.title} ÔÇó {#if episode.aired}{episode.aired}{/if} {#if episode.runtime}{episode.runtime} min{/if} {#if rivenEpisode}{/if}
{/snippet} {#snippet episodeBody(episode: any, rivenEpisode: any)}
{#if episode.overview}

{episode.overview}

{/if} {#if episode.image}
{/if} {#if rivenEpisode?.filesystem_entry || rivenEpisode?.media_metadata} {@const meta = rivenEpisode.media_metadata} {@const fs = rivenEpisode.filesystem_entry} {@const video = meta?.video}
{@render sectionHeading("File Details")}
{#if meta?.filename}

Current Filename

{meta.filename}

{/if} {#if video}
Video
{#if video.resolution_width && video.resolution_height}{video.resolution_width}x{video.resolution_height}{/if} {#if video.codec}{video.codec}{/if} {#if video.hdr_type}{video.hdr_type}{/if}
{/if} {#if meta?.audio_tracks?.length}
Audio
{#each meta.audio_tracks as track} {track.codec}{track.channels ? track.channels === 8 ? " 7.1" : track.channels === 6 ? " 5.1" : ` ${track.channels}ch` : ""}{track.language ? ` (${track.language.toUpperCase()})` : ""} {/each}
{/if} {#if meta?.quality_source}
Source
{meta.quality_source} {#if meta?.is_remux}REMUX{/if}
{/if} {#if fs?.file_size}
Size
{formatSize(fs.file_size)}
{/if}
{/if}
{/snippet} {data.mediaDetails?.details.title} ({data.mediaDetails?.details.year}) - Riven {#key data.mediaDetails?.details.id}
{#if data.mediaDetails?.details.backdrop_path}
{/if}
{#if data.mediaDetails?.details.backdrop_path || data.mediaDetails?.details.trailer}
{#if !showTrailer}
{#if data.mediaDetails?.details.logo} {:else}
{/if}
{#if data.riven?.state === "Completed"} {/if} {#if data.mediaDetails?.details.trailer} {/if}
{:else} {/if}
{/if}

{data.mediaDetails?.details.title}

{#if data.riven?.state} {/if}
{#if !data.riven && data.mediaDetails?.type && data.mediaDetails?.details?.id != null} Request Manual Scrape {:else if data.riven?.id != null} Reset Retry {#if data.mediaDetails?.type === "tv" && seasonData.some((s) => s.status !== "Available")} Request More {/if} Manual Scrape {#if data.riven.state !== "Completed"} {#if data.riven.state === "Paused"} Resume {:else} Pause {/if} {/if} Delete {#snippet child({ props })} {/snippet} Raw Riven Data 
{JSON.stringify(
                                                    data.riven,
                                                    null,
                                                    2
                                                )}
 {/if}
{#each details as detail, i} {detail} {#if i < details.length - 1}ÔÇó{/if} {/each}
{#if data.mediaDetails?.details.genres?.length}
{#each data.mediaDetails?.details.genres as genre (genre.id)} {genre.name} {/each}
{/if} {#if ratingsData?.scores?.length}
{#each ratingsData.scores as score (score.name)} {#if score.image}{/if} {score.score} {/each}
{:else if ratingsLoading}
{#each [1, 2, 3] as _, i (i)}
{/each}
{/if}

{data.mediaDetails?.details.overview}

{#if data.mediaDetails?.type === "movie"} {@const movieDetails = data.mediaDetails.details} {#if movieDetails.collection}
{@render sectionHeading("Collection")} {#snippet trigger({ props })}
{/snippet} {/if} {/if} {#if data.mediaDetails?.type === "tv" && data.mediaDetails?.details.seasons}
{@render sectionHeading("Seasons")} {#each data.mediaDetails?.details.seasons as season (season.id)} {@const rivenSeason = data.riven?.seasons?.find( (s) => s.season_number === season.number )} {/each}
{/if} {#if data.mediaDetails?.type === "tv" && data.mediaDetails?.details.episodes}
{@render sectionHeading("Episodes")}
{#each data.mediaDetails?.details.episodes.filter((ep) => ep.seasonNumber?.toString() === selectedSeason) as episode (episode.id)} {@const rivenSeason = data.riven?.seasons?.find( (s) => s.season_number === Number(selectedSeason) )} {@const rivenEpisode = rivenSeason?.episodes?.find( (e) => e.episode_number === episode.number )} {@const episodeDeepLinkKey = getEpisodeDeepLinkKey( episode.seasonNumber, episode.number )} {@const isEpisodeDeepLinked = episodeDeepLinkKey !== null && highlightedEpisodeKey === episodeDeepLinkKey} {@const episodeDomId = getEpisodeCardDomId( episode.seasonNumber, episode.number )} {#if isMobile.current}
